headline: NetApp Inc. (NASDAQ:NTAP): A Sustainable Dividend Stock with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Focus on dividend sustainability, not just high yields. NetApp (NTAP) offers a 1.88% yield, strong profitability rating of 9/10, and a conservative 34% payout ratio, making it a reliable pick for long-term dividend investors.
